_doc: Hand-curated map from a video's normalized name to one or more catalog ME normalized names. Key format: '<class>:<normalized video name>'. Value: a string (single-target) or an array of strings (compound video covering multiple MEs). Used by scripts/match.mjs when a video doesn't match an ME directly.
_residual_orphans: These remain unmatched because the ME doesn't exist in bisbeard's catalog under any close name — likely stale Whiter videos for MEs that were renamed or removed: warrior:Stormhammer, mage:Temporal Haste, priest:Wanding, rogue:Crimson Tempest. They stay as orphans until/unless verified.
